failure_modes.text: Signal can fail when experts compress so aggressively that they remove decision-critical nuance along with the noise.
failure_modes.source_quote: The primary limitation of this model is that while it optimizes for clarity and efficiency, it is susceptible to human cognitive biases, particularly among experts.
failure_modes.mitigation: Verify that compression has not removed decision-critical nuance; signal fails when experts strip out too much along with the noise.

failure_modes.text: The message can remain correct but unusable because sequencing, chunking, or framing prevents comprehension and adoption.
failure_modes.source_quote: Works when the same decision is failing because of message shape, not message truth.
failure_modes.mitigation: Audit sequencing, chunking, and framing: a correct but unusable message still fails if the audience cannot comprehend and adopt it.

failure_modes.text: Framework choice can distort the signal when the communicator lets a favorite tool define the problem instead of the problem defining the tool.
failure_modes.source_quote: Allowing the tool (framework) to define the problem rather than the problem defining the tool.
failure_modes.mitigation: Let the problem define the framework rather than letting a favorite tool define the problem; framework choice can distort the signal.

premortem_questions.text: What is the core signal that must survive if everything nonessential is removed?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Best when the communicator must choose what not to say.

premortem_questions.text: Which part of this message is failing because of shape or sequencing rather than because the content is false?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Works when the same decision is failing because of message shape, not message truth.

premortem_questions.text: What detail feels optional but would make the recommendation dangerously misleading if removed?
premortem_questions.source_quote: The main challenge is pruning, ordering, and packaging information so the core signal survives contact with limited working memory.

heuristics.text: Prune the message until the core signal becomes visible without removing the detail that makes the action safe.
heuristics.source_quote: Best when the communicator must choose what not to say.

heuristics.text: Sequence and chunk information for limited working memory instead of assuming accurate content will carry itself.
heuristics.source_quote: CLT establishes the limits of working memory.

heuristics.text: Use mutually exclusive structure so overlapping arguments do not bury the signal under confusion.
heuristics.source_quote: MECE ensures that all aspects of a problem are covered without unnecessary overlap, which maximizes clarity and minimizes confusion.

curation_notes.summary: Focused on signal preservation, pruning, and memory-aware structure rather than on general communication advice.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor presentation sprawl because the raw source is stronger on chunking, MECE structure, and signal survival.
open_questions: The first failure mode is normalized from the expert-compression and curse-of-knowledge material so it stays reusable beyond pedagogy contexts.

allies: The raw allies section is strongest on cognitive-load-theory, simplification, and systems-thinking for later relation preservation.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section names law-of-the-instrument style misuse and motivated reasoning, but only the cleanest current-vocabulary ids should survive Wave 3.
structured_tensions: The source is tension-real around compression versus completeness even without a dedicated structured tension block.
